floors.name: The Musty Cellars
floors.mechanicalConstraint: Enemies have high physical defense - raw attacks deal reduced damage. Use fire or poison spells.

rooms.name: Cellar Entrance
rooms.description: Cold stone walls drip with moisture. A faint breeze flows from deeper within.

rooms.name: Guard Chamber
rooms.description: Broken barrels and rusty weapons litter the floor. Something stirs in the shadows.

rooms.name: Old Storage Room
rooms.description: Dusty shelves line the walls. A hooded figure rummages through crates.

rooms.name: Abandoned Kitchen
rooms.description: A warm hearth still glows faintly. You could rest here.

rooms.name: Runesmith's Workshop
rooms.description: Glowing runes cover a stone table. The air crackles with latent energy.

rooms.name: Armored Hallway
rooms.description: Suits of armor line the corridor. One of them moves.

rooms.name: Hidden Vault
rooms.description: Golden light seeps through cracks in the wall. A chest sits in the center.

rooms.name: Cellar Depths
rooms.description: A massive slime blocks the stairway down. It pulses with absorbed minerals, shrugging off your basic strikes.

floors.name: The Haunted Galleries
floors.mechanicalConstraint: Wraiths reflect direct spell damage. Use physical skills or DoT effects to bypass their shields.

rooms.name: Gallery Entrance
rooms.description: Faded paintings hang from crumbling walls. An eerie glow permeates everything.

rooms.name: Shattered Hall
rooms.description: Broken glass crunches underfoot. Orcs have made camp among the ruins.

rooms.name: Portrait Gallery
rooms.description: The eyes in the paintings seem to follow you. A spectral librarian floats nearby.

rooms.name: Conservatory
rooms.description: Moonlight streams through a cracked ceiling. Plants have reclaimed this space.

rooms.name: Arcane Laboratory
rooms.description: Bubbling vials and arcane circles cover every surface. Power resonates here.

rooms.name: Haunted Gallery
rooms.description: A wraith phases through the walls, its touch draining life itself. Direct spells bounce off its ethereal shield.

rooms.name: Treasury
rooms.description: Gem-encrusted coffers line the walls. Not all treasures are unguarded.

rooms.name: Grand Hall
rooms.description: A dark mage hovers above a runic circle, channeling forbidden power. Your basic spells fizzle against her ward.

rooms.name: Freedom!
rooms.description: Sunlight blinds you as you emerge from the dungeon. You have escaped!
